plugins.name: pg-plugin
plugins.description: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills — define-goal, dispatch, and loop-architect: turn plain-language wants into measurable goal contracts in a docs/goals queue, work the queue with isolated implementer agents, and design autonomous loop contracts.

plugins.name: swiftui-ios
plugins.description: Ground AI-written SwiftUI in real production usage from iOS & iPadOS apps, plus skills (domain audits + write/modernize/scaffold): lookup/consensus/deprecation/recipes + domain audits via the swiftui-ctx CLI, slash commands, a review agent, and a deprecation hook.
